feed.description: Investing conversations for normal humans: frameworks, risk, and the habits that matter more than predictions.
feed.title: Long Horizon Notes

bullets: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes. Today we're talking about real estate underwriting, and I'm joined by Isabel, real estate underwriter. Isabel, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Daniel was on episode 1 making the case for behavioral discipline in index investing. The same discipline keeps you from buying the wrong building.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes. Today we're talking about real estate underwriting, and I'm joined by Isabel, real estate underwriter. Isabel, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Real Estate: Numbers Before Narratives
